name: Wisdom Kinoti
tagline: I blueprint things before they escape. Most of them turn into something real.
philosophy: I work at the intersection of cybersecurity, AI-powered systems, and philosophical inquiry. The approach is the same: deep system understanding over surface-level completion.
openTo: Technically serious conversations around cybersecurity, local AI, diagnostics, automation, secure AI-assisted systems, and practical tools in the African context.
